name: salon-mobile-app
description: Offline-first beauty salon accounting app — React + IndexedDB + Capacitor (Android APK)

scripts.cap:add-android: cd frontend && npx cap add android
scripts.cap:sync: cd frontend && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:open: cd frontend && npx cap open android
scripts.apk:debug: cd frontend && yarn build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.apk:release: cd frontend && yarn build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
